title: Trademark Registration Service Bangalore | Virtual Auditor
description: Trademark registration in Bangalore. TM search, application filing, objection handling. Protect your brand. Call +91-95139 39333.
bodyText:
Looking for trademark registration in Bangalore? Virtual Auditor provides complete trademark registration services in Bangalore — from trademark search and classification through application filing, objection reply, and registration certificate. Protect your brand identity with expert assistance.

What is Trademark Registration Service Bangalore | Virtual Auditor?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Comprehensive trademark search across the Indian Trademark Registry database to check availability and identify conflicting marks. Trademark classification advisory — correct Nice Classification (45 classes) selection for your goods and services. TM-A application filing with the Trademark Registry. Trademark objection reply (TM-O) if the examiner raises objections. Trademark opposition defence (TM-O) if a third party opposes your mark. Registration certificate upon successful examination and publication. Post-registration advisory on trademark renewal (every 10 years) and infringement protection.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Trademark Registration in Bangalore
  Bangalore's startup and technology ecosystem produces countless brands that need intellectual property protection. A registered trademark gives you exclusive rights to use the mark, the ability to take legal action against infringers, and the power to license or franchise your brand. Virtual Auditor handles the complete lifecycle — search, filing, examination, objection reply, and registration. We also advise on multi-class applications (single application covering multiple classes) and international trademark registration through the Madrid Protocol. Our Bangalore office provides in-person brand consultation.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Brand consultation — name/logo review, distinctiveness assessment, classification determination. Step 2: Trademark search — comprehensive database search for identical and similar marks. Step 3: Application filing — TM-A with correct classification and goods/services description. Step 4: Examination tracking and objection reply (if raised). Step 5: Publication in Trademark Journal and opposition period monitoring. Step 6: Registration certificate issuance. Step 7: Renewal tracking and infringement monitoring.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Protect your brand in Bangalore. Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-95139 39333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001

faqs.q: How long does trademark registration take in India?
faqs.a: Typically 12-18 months from filing to registration, subject to examination and opposition. However, you get TM™ status immediately upon filing, which provides interim protection. Expedited examination is available for an additional government fee.

Brand names, logos, taglines, product names, colour combinations, sound marks, and shape marks. The mark must be distinctive and not descriptive of the goods/services. We assess distinctiveness and recommend modifications if needed.

faqs.q: What is the cost of trademark registration in Bangalore?
faqs.a: Government fee is Rs 4,500 for individuals/startups and Rs 9,000 for others (per class). Our professional fee covers search, filing, examination follow-up, and objection reply. Contact +91-95139 39333 for a complete quote.
